title: goodenia pilosa subsp. pilosa
intro: Goodenia pilosa subsp. pilosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, commonly known as a native Australian herb. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Goodenia pilosa subsp. pilosa include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
